dashboard.agentCardSub: Ask AI to quickly find and analyse your family documents.
dashboard.agentInputPlaceholder: For example: What insurance documents do we have?

overlay.toastSummaryCascadeSuccess: Summary, category, and tags were updated
overlay.toastSummaryCascadePartial: Summary updated, but cascade update is incomplete
overlay.toastSummaryRegenFailedKeep: Summary regeneration failed, category and tags were kept unchanged

contentOverlay.reasonSourceMissing: Source file is missing. Showing extracted text fallback.
contentOverlay.reasonNotReady: Document is not ready yet, original preview unavailable.
contentOverlay.reasonUnsupported: Inline preview is not supported for this format.
contentOverlay.reasonAvailabilityEndpointMissing: Preview availability endpoint is unavailable. Showing extracted text fallback.
contentOverlay.reasonAvailabilityUnavailable: Preview availability check failed. Showing extracted text fallback.
contentOverlay.reasonGeneric: Inline preview is unavailable. Showing extracted text.
contentOverlay.noExtractedText: No extracted text available. Use download to open the source file.

agent.welcomeSub: I can help find files, answer questions and organise your documents.
agent.suggestion1: What insurance documents do we have?
agent.suggestion4: How was Zhang Wei's check-up result?
agent.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question or give an instruction...
agent.inputHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line
agent.errorTimeout: Sorry, processing "{query}" timed out (after one automatic retry). Please try again shortly.
agent.errorNetwork: Network connection issue. I can't process "{query}" right now. Please check your connection and retry.
agent.errorGateway: The service is temporarily busy. Processing "{query}" failed (after one automatic retry). Please try again later.
agent.errorServer: The service failed while processing "{query}". Please try again later.
agent.fallbackAnswer: Sorry, I can't process "{query}" right now. Please try again later.
